info.title: Eka API Suite
info.description: Eka care API suite built with Fastify + TypeScript.

patch.description: Reschedules an appointment to a new time window via @orbi/product-sdk. Requires a `jwt-payload` header containing `b-id` and `oid`.

start_time.description: New start time as a Unix epoch in seconds (no milliseconds).

end_time.description: New end time as a Unix epoch in seconds (no milliseconds). Must be after start_time.

partner_appointment_id.description: Optional caller-supplied id fragment. When provided, the new appointment id becomes `api-<business_table_id>-<partner_appointment_id>` (business_table_id is resolved from `b-id`) and the `:id` path param is treated as a partner fragment resolved to `api-<business_table_id>-<:id>`. When omitted, the server generates the new id as `api-<uuid>` and uses `:id` as-is.

get.summary: Get an IPD admission by id
get.description: Fetches an IPD admission via @orbi/ipd-admission-sdk (`getAdmissionById`), scoped to the caller's business. Requires a `jwt-payload` header containing `b-id` and `oid`.

parameters.name: admission_id
parameters.description: Id of the IPD admission to fetch (document id under `ipd/{b-id}/admissions`).

stage.description: Coarse lifecycle stage (`IN`/`AD`/`DC`) — replaced the legacy coarse `status`.

status.description: Granular lifecycle status within the current `stage`.

post.description: Creates an IPD admission via @orbi/ipd-admission-sdk (`createAdmission`), scoped to the caller's business. The admission id is server-generated and the acting `oid` is recorded as `actor_oid`. Requires a `jwt-payload` header containing `b-id` and `oid`.

stage.description: Lifecycle stage; defaults to the active inpatient stage (`AD`).

admission_date.description: ISO date-time; defaults to the server now.

date.description: ISO date-time; defaults to the server now.

stage.description: Coarse lifecycle stage (`IN`/`AD`/`DC`) — replaced the legacy coarse `status`.

status.description: Granular lifecycle status within the current `stage`.

get.description: Reads the patient's medical history from setu (S3-backed FHIR store), scoped to the caller's business, and returns it grouped by category. A patient with nothing recorded yields `version: 0` and empty categories. Requires a `jwt-payload` header containing `b-id` and `oid`.

parameters.name: patient_id
parameters.description: Patient identifier (eka patient oid). Medical history is scoped to this patient within the caller's business.

version.description: Head version this snapshot was read from (0 = nothing recorded yet).

none_known.description: True when this category was explicitly asserted empty.

resource_type.description: FHIR resource type this line projects to (e.g. Condition).

resource_id.description: Stable line id (setu-derived); pass its `code` again to update it.

system.description: Coding system URI — the MDB catalog (`http://eka.care/mdb`) or a locale system for free text.

post.description: Writes the patient's medical history to setu. Each category is optional: send an array to **assert** its final state, or `{ merge: [...] }` to **upsert** without removing other lines; `no_known_history: true` asserts every category empty. Line ids are derived by setu from the coding, so re-posting the same `code` updates that line (idempotent). The acting `oid` is recorded as the author. Requires a `jwt-payload` header containing `b-id` and `oid`.

schema.description: Each category is optional: omit a category to leave it untouched. Send an array to assert its final state, or `{ merge: [...] }` to upsert without removing existing lines.

conditions.description: Array = assert final state; { merge: [...] } = upsert without removing others.

system.description: Coding system URI — the MDB catalog (`http://eka.care/mdb`) or a locale system for free text.

since.description: Onset / “since” — free text or ISO date.

reported_at.description: When this line was last reported/edited (ISO date-time).

relation.description: family_history only — the family member (free text, e.g. `Father`); mapped to a FHIR relationship code.

performed_on.description: past_procedures only — when the procedure was performed (ISO date).

no_known_history.description: When true, asserts every category empty (a whole-MH “nothing known”). Overrides any sections sent.

recorded_at.description: Snapshot timestamp (ISO date-time). Defaults to now.

merge_upsert.summary: Merge (upsert) one medication, leaving other sections untouched

full_assert.summary: Assert a full multi-category medical history

requestBody.description: Each category is optional: omit a category to leave it untouched. Send an array to assert its final state, or `{ merge: [...] }` to upsert without removing existing lines.

parameters.name: patient_id
parameters.description: Patient identifier (eka patient oid). Medical history is scoped to this patient within the caller's business.

version.description: New head version after the save.

txn_id.description: Transaction id stamped on every line written by this save.
